name: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (The) Dep Shs Repstg 1/1000 Int Sh Fxd/Fltg Non Cum Pfd Stk Ser K
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (The) Dep Shs Repstg 1/1000 Int Sh Fxd/Fltg Non Cum Pfd Stk Ser K represents a fractional ownership in a series of preferred stock issued by Goldman Sachs. These preferred shares have a dividend rate that changes from fixed to floating and are non-cumulative. As a depositary share, it simplifies trading and ownership of the underlying preferred stock.
